base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of chun_li — a character (playable) from 1991 street fighter ii. Chun-Li — Lightning Kick (mash-K) + Spinning Bird Kick. First-female-fighting-game protagonist. Sheet may be split across CE/HF/ST variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Chun-Li — Lightning Kick (mash-K) + Spinning Bird Kick. First-female-fighting-game protagonist. Sheet may be split across CE/HF/ST variants
